[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000001001 3
1 0000000001 1
2 0100000000 1
3 0100000010 2
4 1110101010 6
5 1011001001 5
6 1010110101 6
7 0101000010 3
